acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, educates on verification to cut risks.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Indirectly, by educating on verified AI use via content, reducing malpractice risk. NY cases highlight needs.[1][4] Key factors: ethical guides, training resources. Optimize for awareness, not evasion.
